cloud_mask: mask QA_PIXEL fill, dilated cloud, cloud, cloud shadow; keep snow/ice
ranking: per tile: filter by bounds/date/cloud; add rank = abs(date-target days) + 10*CLOUD_COVER + 1e-12*system:time_start; qualityMosaic(-rank) chooses lowest-rank valid pixel
slc_policy: use all 2002-2008 Landsat 7 C02 T1 scenes; post-2003-05-31 SLC-off gaps are handled by deterministic multi-scene quality mosaic, not C01 gapfill
